caption: The video features two men seated at a table, engaged in a professional discussion during what appears to be a tech or business event, as indicated by the backdrop with logos and hashtags like "#BigDataSV 2015" and "theCUBE." The man on the left, dressed in a dark suit, is gesturing animatedly with his hands, suggesting he is explaining or emphasizing a point. The man on the right, wearing a gray suit, listens attentively while looking at a laptop screen, possibly reviewing notes or data related to the conversation. Both individuals have microphones clipped to their clothing, indicating that this is a recorded or broadcasted session. The setting includes a table with laptops, a notepad, and a pen, further reinforcing the professional and informative nature of the event.
